meta.description: UI Parity Analysis: Odoo construction menus/actions/views vs Privod2 Next routes/pages
meta.methodology: For each of 104 Odoo capabilities with construction.* models, map the Odoo menu path, action view_mode, and registered views to corresponding Next routes/pages. Check view type coverage (list, form, kanban, pivot, graph, calendar, gantt). Status: MATCHED = all view types covered, PARTIAL = some covered, MISSING = none covered or no route.

entries.gap: No view types covered. Odoo has: form
